source_name: Code4rena Nudge.xyz Findings and Analysis Report (2025-03) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_title: Initial reward amount not validated in deployAndFundCampaign
summary: NudgeCampaignFactory.deployAndFundCampaign can be called with initialRewardAmount equal to zero. Although the function name implies deployment plus funding, it can create an unfunded campaign, which is inconsistent and can confuse campaign administrators or users.
root_cause: missing positive-amount validation for a funding-specific deployment function
why_not_medium_or_high: zero initial funding is mainly a configuration and UX correctness issue; it does not create a permissionless theft path or direct loss by itself
operational_risk: administrators may believe a campaign was funded when it was not, and participants may interact with campaigns unable to distribute rewards until separately funded
recommended_mitigation: use a separate deploy-only function for unfunded campaign creation
when_it_could_escalate: if external systems automatically promote deployAndFundCampaign campaigns as funded
if unfunded campaigns cause user gas waste or failed reward expectations
if a malicious operator can create misleading campaigns
